questionText: Break down your total planned CAPEX in your current CAPEX plan for products and services (e.g. smart grids, digitalization, etc.).
questionKo: your total planned CAPEX in your current CAPEX plan for 제품 및 서비스 (e.g. smart grids, digitalization, etc.).을/를 세분화하여 입력하십시오.
simpleHelp: The advancement of decentralized power production and new technologies underpins the potential of the energy utilities & power generators sector to undergo a transition to low-carbon energy sources. The level of investment in emerging products and services provides an indication of the level to which future earning capacity of core business might be impacted.

columns.text: Percentage of total CAPEX planned for products and services
columns.textKo: Percentage of total 자본지출(CAPEX) planned for 제품 및 서비스

guidance.text:
General 
If you select "Other, please specify," provide a label for the product and/or service.
Description of product/service (column 2) 
Provide a description of the application of the new product or service. Please include:
An overview of the product and service;
The applicable markets and customer type (residential, commercial, municipal);
The number of customers product/service may impact; and
The expected energy production and/or energy savings associated and the stage of implementation (exploration, installation, initial or full implementation).
CAPEX planned for product/service (column 3) 
Enter your planned CAPEX for the new product/service you are reporting.
The CAPEX figure should be in the currency you selected in 1.2.
Percentage of total CAPEX planned for products and services (column 4) 
Enter the percentage that this CAPEX represents in terms of total CAPEX planned for products and service.
guidance.textKo: 일반 만약 you select "Other, 직접 입력," provide a label 에 대한 product 및/또는 service. Description of product/service (열 2) Provide a description 의 application 의 new product 또는 service. Please include: An overview 의 product 및 service; The 해당되는 경우 markets 및 customer type (residential, commercial, municipal); The number of customers product/service may impact; 및 The expected energy production 및/또는 energy savings associated 및 the stage of implementation (exploration, installation, initial 또는 full implementation). 자본지출(CAPEX) planned for product/service (열 3) Enter your planned 자본지출(CAPEX) 에 대한 new product/service you are reporting. The 자본지출(CAPEX) figure 해야 합니다 be in the currency you 선택 in 1.2. Percentage of total 자본지출(CAPEX) planned for 제품 및 서비스 (열 4) Enter the percentage that this 자본지출(CAPEX) represents in terms of total 자본지출(CAPEX) planned for products 및 service.

guidance.text: Capital expenditure (CAPEX): a measure of the value of purchases of fixed assets such as property, buildings, an industrial plant, technology, or equipment. Put differently, CapEx is any type of expense that an organization capitalizes, or shows on its balance sheet as an investment, rather than on its income statement as an expenditure.
guidance.textKo: 자본지출 (자본지출(CAPEX)): a measure 의 value of purchases of fixed assets such as property, buildings, an industrial plant, technology, 또는 equipment. Put differently, 자본지출(CAPEX) is 하나 이상 type of expense that an organization capitalizes, 또는 shows on its balance sheet as an investment, rather than on its income statement as an expenditure.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성 행 in proportion to the number of 행 공개. 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Table completed - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Table 완성 - 1 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다.

The level of investment in emerging 제품 및 서비스 provides an indication 의 level to which future earning capacity of core business might be impacted.
